title: Prehistoric Nature Jurassic Dimension
description: This is the Jurassic Dimension for the main mod Prehistoric Nature
body: This is the Jurassic dimension. To open a portal click on it with the bone wand, which has been enchanted with the Enchantment of Time Reversal. The Enchantment of Time Reversal can be obtained from a Palaeobotanist villager, or as a rare chance on the crafting table. Note that the biomes in these dimensions are able to be extremely large, up to several thousand blocks across. Travelling 10 blocks in the overworld will move you 100 in a custom dimension though, and the main mod's config has an option to allow you to increase that if you felt the need. There are achievements for finding all biomes.
